claims: The skill requires installing an external utility (`openclaw-core`) with highly suspicious installation instructions. The macOS command is base64-encoded and downloads/executes a script from an IP address (91.92.242.30) without clear disclosure of what the script does, posing a significant security risk. This is unrelated to the core YouTube API functionality and could lead to unauthorized system access or data exfiltration.
